comment.body:
> Ok, found the apk. Ads are blocked. Please clear the filtering log, close this app, reproduce ads and export the filtering log (new feature in the last nightly build), and upload the file here.

也就是说，我需要下载最新的夜间版本进行测试？

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm46212814?ref=pc_my_timeline](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.nicovideo.jp%2Fwatch%2Fsm46212814%3Fref%3Dpc_my_timeline) ### Comment > プレミアム会員登録ボタン及び、横の☆ボタンを手動ブロックしたところ以前は問題なく動作していたのだが、サイトを読み込まなくなった。 > AdGuardをOFFにしても改善せず、ユーザールールを削除しても変わらなかったので、アンインストールしたのだが挙動が全く変わらなかった。 ### Screenshots

AdGuard Base filter

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Japanese filter Filters last update: | 2026-04-23T21:00:43 Tracking protection: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.3.1.52&system_version=Windows+11&manifest_version=3&browser=edge&filters=2.7&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&filters_last_update=2026-04-23T21%3A00%3A43)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://vk.com/audio-2001689051_148689051](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fvk.com%2Faudio-2001689051_148689051) ### Comment > Выключается плеер вконтакте когда включен Adguard. Когда выключен - появляется. Музыка играет по меню сверху или при нажатии кнопки "слушать". Вероятно из за того что гении из команды ВК что то изменили в коде виджета плеера и там по умолчанию должна крутиться реклама. > > The VKontakte player turns off when Adguard is turned on. When it's turned off, it appears. Music plays from the menu above or when you press the "listen" button. Probably because the geniuses from the VK team changed something in the code of the player widget and advertising should run there by default. ### Screenshots

issue.title: Submitting dangerous websites, hoping you will block these websites
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

下面的网站都是钓鱼网站，伪装成正版软件官网，但是其实不是正版网站，而且里面的软件还是病毒软件。域名包含“chrome”的是伪装成chrome下载网站的钓鱼网站。域名包含“todesk”的是伪装成软件todesk官网的钓鱼网站。域名包含“qishui”的是伪装成qishui音乐软件官网的钓鱼网站。

```
m-chrome-chrome.com.cn
aisiapp.com.cn
sogou-ai.com.cn
qishuiyinyue-music.hl.cn
ww-qishui.com.cn
yinyue-qishui.hl.cn
dy-qishuimusic.hl.cn
www.e-sanpei.com
sxm-wps.com.cn
sowgou.com.cn
qishui-eom.com.cn
qishui.bj.cn
ch-qishui-music.com.cn
aisi-zhi.com.cn
qishuiyy.com.cn
qishuimusic-cn.hl.cn
od-todesk.com.cn
ql-qishui.com.cn
qishui-gf.com.cn
todesk-todesk.com.cn
huoronggh.com
pccare-360.cn
apps-wps-offce.com.cn
wpp-wps.cn
gf-qishuiapp.com.cn
music-qishuiyinle.hl.cn
sh-qishuimusic.com.cn
```

### Proposed solution

封禁网站。

### Additional information

_No response_
